scripts.build: npm run generate:api-types && npm run -w @bitsnovels/web build
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.lint: npm run -w @bitsnovels/web lint && node scripts/run_python.mjs -m ruff check server
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:web && npm run test:api-types
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w @bitsnovels/web typecheck && node scripts/run_python.mjs -m mypy server
